candidate_definition_hints.text: Google Cloud CLI Docker Image - Docker Image containing the gcloud CLI and its bundled components.

The Google Cloud CLI Docker image lets you pull a specific version of gcloud CLI as a Docker image from [Artifact Registry](https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry) and quickly execute Google Cloud CLI commands in an isolated, correctly configured container.

candidate_glosses.text: The Google Cloud CLI Docker image lets you pull a specific version of gcloud CLI as a Docker image from [Artifact Registry](https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry) and quickly execute Google Cloud CLI commands in an isolated, correctly configured container.
